overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban plaza in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily through a modern commercial district with elevated highways, digital billboards, and concrete planters, transitioning from a covered walkway into an open plaza and passing by NPCs including a woman in athletic wear talking on her phone.

curved elevated roadway structure with white concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a covered walkway adjacent to a modern commercial building with visible HVAC units. The camera moves forward toward an open plaza area, with an elevated highway ramp and distinctive pink-striped digital tower visible in the distance. A single NPC sits on a bench to the right, engaged with a device.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with outdoor seating and planters

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with concrete planters and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while turning left toward the main building complex with large digital billboards

large rectangular concrete planter containing palm trees and tropical greenery
metal tables and chairs arranged for outdoor dining
modern white geometric concrete bench with a person seated

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza as the camera turns left. Large concrete planters with palm trees and outdoor cafe seating appear on the left, while the elevated highway moves to the right side of the frame. A modern office building with a grid facade dominates the left view, and another seated NPC is visible on a white concrete bench ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza facing large commercial building with digital billboards

events.description: passes close by the female NPC in pink athletic wear who is talking on her phone

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the plaza toward the building with large digital billboards, passing closely by the woman talking on her phone

notable_agents.action: woman in pink athletic shorts and jacket walking toward camera while talking on phone, passes by closely at the end of the segment

entered.detail: massive digital advertising screens mounted on the building facade displaying various advertisements and brand logos

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the main building complex dominated by massive digital billboards on its facade. A woman in pink athletic wear walks toward the camera while talking on her phone, passing by closely around the 25-second mark. The plaza opens up with the modern office complex now directly ahead, and the earlier planters recede into the left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered commercial walkway into a wide, futuristic urban plaza dominated by digital displays. It begins along a covered path beside a building with exposed HVAC units, moving forward toward a distant pink-striped digital tower and an elevated highway ramp. As the camera turns left, the scene opens into a pedestrian plaza where concrete planters with palm trees and outdoor cafe seating emerge on the left while the highway shifts to the right. The view then expands toward a massive office complex with a grid facade and towering digital billboards, passing a woman in pink athletic wear talking on her phone. Finally, the camera settles on the main building complex as the surrounding plaza opens up and the greenery recedes into the background.
